title: Wix Headless Vertical Frontmatter (Phase 1 — discovery only)
description: Validates verticals/<name>.md frontmatter. Phase 1 scope only — later phases (setup, seed, design, pages, build) are owned by @skills/wix-manage plus this skill's own templates and INSTRUCTIONS.md files; per-pack fields (packages, cmsCollections, seed, components, componentsCss, pages, creates, contributes, include) are not part of this skill and not validated here.

triggers.description: Prompt patterns that route to this vertical. Empty allowed for transitive-only packs (ecom, gift-cards, cms). The SKILL.md routing table is the actual source of truth for what gets loaded; this is human reference + a fallback signal.

requires.description: Verticals that must be co-loaded in the same read batch when this pack is loaded. Today: stores → [ecom, gift-cards]; gift-cards → [ecom].

features.description: Feature blurbs for DISCOVERY.md Step 3 Section B.

apps.description: Zero or one entry per pack. apps[0].name fills the Source column of the Pages table.

route.description: URL path (e.g. /cart) OR the literal 'Hosted by Wix' for Wix-hosted endpoints like checkout.

name.description: Optional user-facing page name override for DISCOVERY.md's Section C table. When omitted, the orchestrator derives the name from the path (/ → Home; /thank-you → Thank You). Set this only when path-derivation produces a poor name (e.g. /products/[slug] → 'Product Detail') or when the route has no path (e.g. ecom's Wix-hosted Checkout).

disabled.description: If true, the pack's surfaces (pages, nav links, home blocks) are inactive by default — they ship as code but do not appear without a separate user action (today: enabling the matching Wix app from the dashboard, which the pack's runtime probe detects). DISCOVERY.md plan composition (Sections B + C) skips features and routes from disabled packs so the plan never promises a surface the user did not ask for. Today only the gift-cards pack uses disabled: true.
